title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. guentheri
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. guentheri, also known as hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. Its medicinal properties lie in its high concentration of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, hawkweed is often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
